buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-8 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/20 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-md px-8 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.service: bg-white border border-slate-100 hover:border-primary/20 p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 p-6 rounded-lg border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 transition-all

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

hero.visual: Abstract interactive network canvas (nodes and lines)

human_ai_impact.highlight: Use a glowing effect or gradient text for key terms

timeline.node: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white border-4 border-primary z-10 relative

images.description: Abstract blue lines and dots on black background. Use as background for 'Human-AImpact' section with opacity-20.
Subtle white wall texture. Use as overlay for 'Trust' or 'Testimonials' section with opacity-10 mix-blend-multiply.

motion.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Create a 'NetworkBackground' component using HTML Canvas or SVG that draws nodes and connecting lines. It should be interactive (mouse move affects nodes). Use this in the Hero section.

For the 'Partner Ecosystem' (Kitsap & Ariadne), since no logos are available, create a stylish text-based logo component using a Serif font (e.g., Playfair Display) to contrast with the main Sans-Serif.
Ensure the 'Contact Form' maps to the fields: Name, Company, Role, Email, Phone, Area of Interest (Dropdown), Objective, Timeline, Privacy Consent.
The 'Human-AImpact' section MUST be dark (Deep Violet/Indigo background) to contrast with the rest of the light-themed site.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (H1-H6) and 'Inter' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts in `index.css`.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified (Human-AImpact section).
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
Responsive design is critical - check mobile view for stacking order.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios are met, especially on the dark section.
